headline: Myanmar FLOOR CONFIRMATION with airstrike escalation magnitude documented. Composite remains 0. The UN Special Rapporteur's April 2026 final report to HRC documents junta airstrikes increasing from 9 (2021) to 1,140 (2025) — a 127x escalation over 5 years. 3.6M+ displaced, 12M+ face acute hunger, ~33% of population requires humanitarian assistance. UN expert called for international action to end impunity and break cycle of violence. The April 2026 SR report and the airstrike-magnitude data are new sourced evidence within the recency window not available at May 3 assessment. Floor entity under structural-change-only protocol. Composite unchanged at 0; new evidence appended to floor record. Resolves pending 2026-04-30 proposal carry-over.
floor_protocol_note: Floor-designated entity. The April 2026 UN SR final report magnitude data (127x airstrike escalation 2021-2025) is new primary-source UN documentation within window. The bad-faith ceasefire pattern documented in May 3 cycle is sustained. Composite cannot move below floor; new evidence is appended to the floor-exit-criteria record only.
key_evidence: UN Special Rapporteur Tom Andrews April 2026 final report to HRC: airstrikes 9 (2021) → 1,140 (2025), a 127x escalation over 5 years.
3.6M+ displaced; 12M+ face acute hunger; ~33% of population requires humanitarian assistance.
UN expert called for international action to end impunity and break cycle of violence.
Junta sham election process: Round 1 exposed as illegitimate by UN.
Bad-faith ceasefire pattern (declared cessation concurrent with continued attacks) sustained from May 3 cycle.
ICJ Rohingya genocide case ongoing; ICC investigation continuing.

evidence.finding: UN expert calls for international action to end impunity; final report documents 127x airstrike escalation 2021-2025.
Five-year coup-anniversary documentation: surge in atrocities, displacement, hunger.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 1 unchanged (floor). Suffering recognition by junta absent.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 1 unchanged (floor). 127x airstrike escalation is direct harm production, not response.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 1 unchanged (floor). Aid disproportionately blocked in opposition areas.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 1 unchanged (floor). UN-documented impunity; SR explicitly calling for international action because domestic mechanisms absent.

UN SR explicit call for international intervention to end impunity (escalated framing vs. previous reports)
negativeSignals: 127x airstrike escalation; 3.6M+ displaced; 12M+ acute hunger; UN explicit impunity-action call; sham election process exposed; bad-faith ceasefire pattern continuing.
sector_context: Floor-cluster (Myanmar, Sudan, South Sudan, Israel, North Korea, Eritrea) all confirmed at floor. Myanmar distinguished by bad-faith ceasefire pattern + quantified scale of escalation now formally documented by UN SR.
